verificationNote: Indicative requirements for ISO 27001:2022 people controls. Not verbatim ISO text.

requirements.requirement: Conduct background verification checks on all candidates prior to employment, proportionate to the role sensitivity and applicable regulations.
Include information security responsibilities in employment agreements, covering obligations during and after employment.
Deliver information security awareness training to all personnel upon joining and periodically thereafter, with role-specific training for key functions.
Establish and communicate a formal disciplinary process for information security policy violations.
Define, enforce, and communicate information security responsibilities that remain valid after termination or change of employment.
Implement security measures for remote working including endpoint protection, VPN usage, and physical environment security.
Provide accessible mechanisms for personnel to report observed or suspected information security events in a timely manner.
